features.featureTitle: Audit every location in the codebase where a contact email address appears — including the Contact section form action/mailto link, the contact info card email display link, the Footer email link, and any other mailto: href — and verify that each one uses exactly 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com'. Correct any mismatched, missing, or malformed email addresses so that all mailto: links and form submission targets point to sv.couverture95@gmail.com.
